text:
i want to build a farcaster miniapp for swaps using the relay api

Make it mobile-friendly and optimized for Warpcast (424x695px on web).

Include proper Mini App setup: call sdk.actions.ready() on load, fc:miniapp meta tags, manifest for embeds

i want to swap any token on all the relay supported 85 chains

here is the docs link of relay

https://docs.relay.link/

integrate all the api's into the app

we are not running out of time. integrate all the advanced features, use all the api's in the relay api reference docs

check over and over if all the api's are integrated and fully functional. the swaps result in errors. run complete diagnostics and fix any errors possible.

dont eliminate assets to fill your incapabilities. i want the interface to have it all without needing to scroll. adjust the dpi accordingly

i want the chain and token logos to show on the interface as well as while selecting them

i also want to be able to input contract address and find any token with logos on the supported chains

i also want shareable swap receipts just like how farcaster did it.

i want batch/cleanup swaps like kondo and jeetswap. use native swapToken in a loop or custom Wagmi for multi-calls

i want a daily streak and a top swappers this week leaderboard

after selecting chains and tokens, i want the ui to show available balance if any.

no need for five tabs. make it four - swap, batch cleanup, history and settings tabs. put the trending section under the swap button as a scrollable list. the tokens showed are not the same as shown in farcaster wallet's trending list. fix it until it shows the same tokens.

there is no need for a top traders tab, just a icon which when clicked, the list appears. make the list accurate based on the swap activity

the batch swap tokens should be listed from the connected wallet's available balance, not predetermined.

i want a 'trending on farcaster' section under swap button which reflects the same tokens shown in the trending list of farcaster wallet. fetch the right api and integrate it. don't present wrong results again just to complete the task.
